articles.title: Sipping hot tea can increase cancer risk? Doctor shares a surprising link and suggests a simple fix
articles.description: Drinking tea very hot, especially above 65°C, has been linked to an increased risk of oesophageal cancer. Studies show that consuming beverages at this temperature can damage the oesophagus lining, leading to chronic inflammation and cellular mutations. Allowing tea to cool for a few minutes before drinking significantly reduces this risk.

articles.description: Composer Pritam reflects on the enduring music of 'Gangster' as it marks two decades. He shares poignant memories of collaborating with late singers KK and Zubeen Garg, revealing the deep emotional toll of performing their iconic songs. Pritam discusses his personal ways of coping with loss, highlighting how the film's soundtrack evokes cherished friendships and irreplaceable voices.

articles.title: George Clooney supports Jimmy Kimmel as Donald Trump demands he be fired: ‘Jokes are jokes’
articles.description: Hollywood star George Clooney has defended Jimmy Kimmel amidst a firestorm over a joke about Melania Trump. Clooney contrasted Kimmel's comedy with potentially dangerous political rhetoric, highlighting concerns about heated discourse. The controversy erupted after a clip of Kimmel's joke resurfaced following an incident at the White House Correspondents' Dinner, drawing sharp criticism from President Trump and Melania Trump herself.

articles.title: Did Taylor Swift break up with Travis Kelce? What’s real and what’s rumor?
articles.description: A viral social media post sparked widespread rumors about a breakup between Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce, but the claim lacks any factual basis. Originating from a parody account, the misinformation spread rapidly due to the couple’s global popularity. Despite online panic and ongoing speculation about their busy schedules, there is no confirmation of a split from any credible source. The episode underscores how quickly false narratives can gain traction in the digital age, especially when high-profile figures are involved.
